nasb.text: When they came to the threshing floor of Chidon, Uzza put out his hand to hold the ark, because the oxen nearly upset it.

esv.text: And when they came to the threshing floor of Chidon, Uzzah put out his hand to take hold of the ark, for the oxen stumbled.

cnv.text: 他們到了基頓禾場的時候，因為牛失蹄絆倒，烏撒就伸手扶住約櫃。

ccb.text: 他们来到基顿麦场的时候，拉车的牛失蹄，乌撒就伸手去扶约柜。
